answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like solving problems & thinking analytically

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in full stack developer to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: full stack developer — Certification courses on Coursera
full stack developer — Certification courses on Udemy
full stack developer — Certification tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in frontend frameworks (react, vue.js, angular), backend frameworks (node.js, django, spring boot), and database management (sql and nosql) — these are the essential building blocks for a full stack developer

resources.title: full stack developer — Core Skill Learning courses on Coursera
full stack developer — Core Skill Learning courses on Udemy
full stack developer — Core Skill Learning tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in api development and integration, version control (git), and cloud infrastructure and deployment, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: full stack developer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills courses on Coursera
full stack developer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills courses on Udemy
full stack developer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying frontend frameworks (react, vue.js, angular), and backend frameworks (node.js, django, spring boot) in realistic scenarios

resources.title: full stack developer — Hands-on Practice courses on Coursera
full stack developer — Hands-on Practice courses on Udemy
full stack developer — Hands-on Practice tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

resources.title: full stack developer — Portfolio Building courses on Coursera
full stack developer — Portfolio Building courses on Udemy
full stack developer — Portfolio Building tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your full stack developer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: full stack developer — CV / Profile Building courses on Coursera
full stack developer — CV / Profile Building courses on Udemy
full stack developer — CV / Profile Building tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for full stack developer positions on job boards, company career pages, and freelance platforms (Upwork, Fiverr, Toptal) — tailor each application to the role and be ready to showcase your portfolio in interviews
